critical_issues.title: Duplicate blob_write_succeeded log emission
critical_issues.description: src/blob_writer.py:61 already emits 'blob_write_succeeded' before the PR change. The new emission added in function_app.py:104-105 creates a duplicate on every successful write, double-billing any downstream consumer counting this event.
critical_issues.recommendation: Remove the pre-existing emission from src/blob_writer.py:61 and centralise it in function_app.py. This was done in the final commit.

major_issues.title: Test mock architecture masks duplicate log
major_issues.description: The _patch_imports fixture patches out the entire BlobWriter class, so src/blob_writer.py:61 never executes during any test. Tests give false confidence that blob_write_succeeded fires only once.
major_issues.recommendation: This is an inherent limitation of the mock boundary. Documented via the removal of the duplicate in blob_writer.py, making the tests accurate again.

suggestions.title: Unused import ValidationErrorKind
suggestions.description: ValidationErrorKind was imported but never used in test_player_count_returned_not_called_on_validation_failure.

suggestions.title: Weak run_date_utc format assertion
suggestions.description: assert len(extra['run_date_utc']) == 10 accepts any 10-char string. Should use regex or strptime to validate YYYY-MM-DD format.

suggestions.title: Missing metric-on-conflict test
suggestions.description: No test verifying _PLAYER_COUNT_RETURNED.add() is called when blob_uri=None (write conflict). A future refactor could accidentally gate the metric behind blob_uri is not None.
